entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 38
entries.excerpt: Then Judah took a wife for himself and had by her three sons: Er, Onan, and Shelah. Er, his firstborn, took Tamar to wife. “And Er… was wicked before the Lord” — that is, behaved ungodly before God — “and the Lord slew him” (Gen 38:7). Er’s brother, Onan, loved Tamar and took her to wife. But since he hated his brother, he did not wish to raise up seed to him.…
